chapter_title.en: Negation of Space, Time, Stillness, Motion, Descending, Ascending, and Transference from Allah

parts.text: وروي أنه سئل عليه السلام أين كان ربنا قبل أن يخلق سماء وأرضا؟ فقال

text: عليه السلام: (أين) سؤال عن مكان، وكان الله ولا مكان.

en.sayed-ali-raza-rizvi: 4. And it is narrated that he (AS) was asked: Where was our Lord before He created the Heaven and the Earth? Therefore, he (AS) replied, “`Where’ [ayna] is a question about space, and Allah existed when there was no space.”
